assertions.issues: CRITICAL BUG: Answer options (A/B/C/D) are NOT rendered in the DOM for drill questions. The previous validation (P3-DRILL-003) reported 'Answer options render as <span> elements with CSS instead of <button> elements. Clicking them via JavaScript does not trigger React state update'. This bug appears to still be present or has regressed - the answer options are completely missing from the HTML. Questions display correctly but users cannot select answers.

assertions.issues: Blocked by P3-DRILL-003 answer options bug

frictions.description: Answer options for drill questions are not rendered in the DOM at all - neither as buttons nor as spans. This completely blocks all drill completion testing.
frictions.resolution: Bug P3-DRILL-003 still present or regressed

blockers.description: P3-DRILL-003 bug: Answer options (A/B/C/D) are not rendered in the DOM for drill questions. Questions display correctly but have no selectable answer options. This prevents ANY drill completion and all downstream results/mastery testing.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Verified bug still present - DOM inspection shows no answer option elements (no buttons, no spans with option text). Screenshot confirms question text visible but no answer choices shown.

summary: Tested 10 assertions (P3-RESULT-001 through P3-RESULT-005 and P3-MAST-001 through P3-MAST-005): ALL BLOCKED by P3-DRILL-003 bug. The critical issue is that answer options (A/B/C/D) are NOT rendered in the DOM for drill questions. Questions display correctly with prompts like 'If AL = 41h and ES:DI points to PROGRAM, what will ZF be after SCASB?' but the answer choices are completely missing. Users can only Skip questions - they cannot select and submit answers. This prevents any drill completion and all downstream results summary and mastery tracking functionality cannot be tested. The bug appears unchanged from previous validation.
